title: Weekly 15-Min Ops Review
description: Owner ritual for small business (solo to ~15 people): scan what matters, ignore noise, log one fix. Fifteen minutes, once a week.

mindset.principle: Weekly beat daily panic. Scan, decide, log one fix, move on.

mistakes.label: Treat inbox as the task list

timer.overflow_rule: Park overflow items on next_week_capture template; do not solve today

blocks.label: Inbox and leads
scan: Anything angry or refund tone? (route mf-tpl-001)
One follow-up to send today (name it)

blocks.label: Money snapshot
scan: Cash in bank vs bills due next 7 days (rough OK)
Unpaid invoices out or overdue in?

blocks.label: People
scan: Anyone waiting on you for a yes/no?
One thank-you or correction to deliver

blocks.label: Close and log
scan: One fix for next week (single sentence)
One thing to ignore on purpose

variants.label: Fire week
variants.rule: Run inbox + money only (6 min). Full ritual when fire out.

log_fields.why: Single process fix for next week
What you chose not to touch

automation_hooks.mf-tpl-004: Inbox block: intake SLA and qualify backlog
automation_hooks.mf-tool-003: Jobs block: unpaid scope creep flags
automation_hooks.mf-tpl-001: Inbox block: complaint_mask routes out of intake
automation_hooks.mf-tool-002: Optional: AI draft follow-up after human picks recipient
automation_hooks.mf-tool-001: If one_fix is buy software, run automate rubric first

agent_signal.use_when: Weekly owner or lead ops ritual: money, queue, people, one improvement.
decision_criteria: Hard 15-minute stop; variants for solo vs small team.
Money block pairs with mf-tpl-008 chase status.
agent_signal.operator_context: Idaho seasonal swings: use capacity variant when spring install backlog hits.
agent_signal.not_for: Single client thread — use spine packs for one job.
trigger_phrases: Weekly owner or lead ops ritual: money, queue, people, one improvement.
